revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''urn:mrn:iala:dic:0901116e

VTS operators are responsible for establishing and maintaining a vessel traffic image and interacting with vessel traffic.

Source: IALA Guideline G1156 Recruitment, training and assessment of VTS Personnel, section 4.3.
